entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S
entries.work: Attended the introductory soft skills training session organized as part of the internship wrap-up activities at NYERAS. The session covered the importance of professional communication in workplace environments, including how to structure clear and concise verbal and written communication. Practiced active listening techniques through partner-based exercises and understood how tone, body language, and clarity impact professional interactions. Also received guidance on adapting communication style based on audience.
learning: Fundamentals of workplace communication
How active listening and tone adaptation improve professional effectiveness
Adapting communication style to different audiences
entries.references: NYERAS Soft Skills Training Module 1 - Professional Communication

entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S
entries.work: Continued soft skills training with a focused session on resume building and LinkedIn profile optimization. Reviewed best practices for structuring a resume that highlights technical projects, internship experience, academic achievements, and relevant skills. Practiced writing impactful bullet points that quantify contributions rather than just listing responsibilities. Also worked on updating the LinkedIn profile summary, headline, and project sections to reflect internship work and skills acquired during the NYERAS data analytics internship.
learning: Writing results-oriented resume bullet points
Building a strong LinkedIn presence that communicates professional value
Structuring internship experience for maximum impact
entries.references: NYERAS Soft Skills Training Module 2 - Resume and LinkedIn

entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S
entries.work: Participated in a mock interview session as part of the ongoing soft skills training program. Practiced answering common technical and behavioral interview questions related to data analytics, Python, machine learning, and project experience. Applied the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) to structure behavioral responses clearly and confidently. Received feedback on areas such as confidence, clarity of explanation, and managing nervousness. Also practiced introducing myself professionally and presenting project contributions concisely.
learning: Articulating project experience using the STAR method
Improved confidence in handling technical and behavioral interview scenarios
How to introduce yourself and present technical work concisely
entries.references: NYERAS Soft Skills Training Module 3 - Interview Preparation

entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S
entries.work: Attended a session on time management and personal productivity as part of the soft skills training program. Studied techniques such as the Eisenhower Matrix for task prioritization, the Pomodoro technique for focused work sessions, and daily planning strategies to manage deadlines effectively. Discussed how poor time management affects delivery quality and team collaboration. Worked on creating a personal productivity plan that maps daily tasks against goals and deadlines, applicable both in professional and academic contexts.
learning: Time management frameworks including Eisenhower Matrix and Pomodoro technique
How structured daily planning improves productivity and task delivery quality
Mapping personal goals to actionable daily schedules
entries.references: NYERAS Soft Skills Training Module 4 - Time Management and Productivity

entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S
entries.work: Took part in a team collaboration and professional etiquette session during the soft skills training. Explored how effective teamwork depends on clear role definition, shared accountability, and respectful communication. Studied professional workplace etiquette including email communication standards, meeting behavior, and handling disagreements constructively. Practiced collaborative problem-solving in a group exercise that required dividing responsibilities, tracking progress, and presenting a combined outcome within a defined timeframe.
learning: How structured teamwork and professional etiquette improve workplace outcomes
Email communication standards and professional meeting behavior
Collaborative problem-solving with shared accountability
entries.references: NYERAS Soft Skills Training Module 5 - Teamwork and Etiquette

entries.name: Nagabhushana Raju S
entries.work: Completed the final soft skills training session focused on presentation skills and public speaking. Practiced delivering a three-minute self-introduction and a five-minute project summary presentation in front of the group. Received structured feedback on pacing, slide design, eye contact, and how to handle audience questions calmly. Also studied the principles of storytelling in professional presentations and how a well-structured narrative improves audience engagement. The session concluded with a review of all soft skills covered during the training program.
learning: Confidence in public speaking and structured presentation delivery
How storytelling enhances professional communication
Handling audience questions and integrating feedback into presentations
entries.references: NYERAS Soft Skills Training Module 6 - Presentation and Public Speaking
